laneInventories.conditionText: fresh GC-018 proves an operator-stated product requirement explicitly needs the MPI lane itself and current MPI contract/helper/durable surfaces are insufficient
evidenceFields: operator-stated product requirement explicitly names MPI lane
current MPI contract/helper or durable/reinjection surfaces are source-proven insufficient
live/provider proof plan when governance behavior is claimed
requiredConditions: operator-stated product requirement explicitly needs the MPI lane itself
current MPI contract/helper or pre-existing durable/reinjection surfaces do not satisfy the requirement
live/provider proof when governance behavior is claimed
laneInventories.reproposalRule: Do not re-propose unless every evidence field is source-backed in a fresh GC-018.

laneInventories.conditionText: fresh GC-018 proves a concrete runtime governance behavior claim needs live proof, with secret-safe diagnostics and quota/provider failure classification
requiredConditions: live governance proof when governance behavior is claimed
laneInventories.reproposalRule: Do not re-propose unless a concrete runtime governance behavior claim and diagnostic plan are source-backed.

laneInventories.conditionText: fresh GC-018 proves a concrete adapter behavior or public-surface gap remains after UAP-T2, cites owner source files, and includes public/provenance boundary evidence
evidenceFields: adapter behavior or public-surface gap remains after UAP-T2
requiredConditions: adapter-specific evidence that foundation acceptance applies
laneInventories.reproposalRule: Do not re-propose unless the post-UAP-T2 gap and public/provenance boundary evidence are source-backed.

checkerCandidate.expectedInput: this inventory plus the T7 acceptance ledger and DSD-T1 reopen-condition table
mustReject: lane not present in T7 downstreamReopenGates

claimBoundary: This inventory is a private provenance source map for parked reopen conditions. It does not authorize checker wiring, runtime/provider/live work, public-sync, adapter implementation, package activation, certification, MPI-T6 runtime work, or downstream implementation.
